heading: Travel expenses of Senior Executive Service candidates
label: 5752 Travel expenses of Senior Executive Service candidates
text: Employing agencies may pay candidates for Senior Executive Service positions travel expenses incurred incident to preemployment interviews requested by the employing agency.
notes: Effective DateSection effective 9 months after , and congressional review of provisions of sections 401 through 412 of , see section 415(a)(1), (b) of , set out as an Effective Date note under .Oct. 13, 1978Pub. L. 95–454Pub. L. 95–454section 3131 of this title
